subcodes.title: Words to Miss Boylan and Edith Sanderson, spoken around 1911-08-25
subcodes.first_line: When Jesus Christ came to this world, He planted a tree. I have come to see what has become of that tree. The branches are all turned toward the earth.
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Christ; Christianity, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
